title: NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd:
NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd!
